summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification for mixed shard 249. No GitHub mutations are planned. Security-sensitive refs are routed only; already-closed listed PRs are not given close actions; open non-security PRs are kept for their own maintainer/review path because this shard is not a dedupe cluster and merge/fix actions are blocked.
